Vehicle.title: Vehicle
Vehicle.description: Represents a vehicle in the fleet, such as a truck, trailer, or skid steer.

vin.description: Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) of the vehicle.

year.description: The manufacturing year of the vehicle.

make.description: The make of the vehicle (e.g., Chevy).

type.description: The type of vehicle (e.g., truck, trailer, skid steer).

bedType.description: The bed type of the vehicle (e.g., dump bed, tilt deck).

ChecklistItem.title: ChecklistItem
ChecklistItem.description: Represents a single item on a pre-trip or post-trip inspection checklist.

id.description: Unique identifier for the checklist item.

instructions.description: Detailed instructions for performing the inspection.

vehicleType.description: The Vehicle Type the inspection applies to.

InspectionReport.title: InspectionReport
InspectionReport.description: Represents a pre-trip or post-trip inspection report for a vehicle.

id.description: Unique identifier for the inspection report.

date.description: Date and time the inspection was performed.

type.description: The type of inspection (pre-trip or post-trip).

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the inspection.

InspectionResult.title: InspectionResult
InspectionResult.description: Represents the result of a single checklist item in an inspection report.

id.description: Unique identifier for the inspection result.

status.description: The status of the checklist item (pass or fail).

InventoryItem.title: InventoryItem
InventoryItem.description: Represents a single item in the company's inventory, such as a tool or material.

id.description: Unique identifier for the inventory item.

category.description: A user-defined category for grouping items (e.g., 'Power Tools').

quantity.description: The quantity of the item available.

status.description: The current status of the item.

assignedToType.description: The type of entity the item is assigned to, if in use.

assignedToId.description: The ID of the entity the item is assigned to.

assignedToName.description: The denormalized name of the entity for easy display.

/vehicles/{vehicleId}.description: Stores all information about a single vehicle, including its specifications and maintenance schedule. This collection is the source of truth for all fleet assets.

/checklist_items/{checklistItemId}.description: This is a static collection containing the master list of all possible inspection items for all vehicle types. It is used to generate the checklists dynamically on the client.

/inspection_reports/{inspectionReportId}.description: Contains the main document for each inspection report. It links to the vehicles and user who performed the inspection and holds the overall status.
A subcollection storing the pass/fail result for each individual item within a specific inspection report. This allows for detailed reporting and analysis.

/inventory/{inventoryItemId}.description: Tracks all company inventory, including tools, materials, and consumables.
